title: Origins: Gravity Skater
description: A high-tech genius with anti-gravity expertise, seamlessly integrating knowledge into any boots while effortlessly gliding on a Boots-turned- anti-gravity skates.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

A high-tech genius with anti-gravity expertise, seamlessly integrating knowledge into any boots while effortlessly gliding on a Boots-turned-anti-gravity skates.

🔵 Gravity Upgrader `20231221`
-  When you wearing any things at foots or holding a sword, it will it will automatic apply Anti-Gravity technology. Pressing [Secondary_Activator] to switch mode between modes. You can toggle all feature by [Crouch + Secondary Activator].

🔵 Skates plugins `20231226`
- When you wearing any things at foots, it will it will automatic apply Anti-Gravity technology. Press [Primary_Activator] to open Plugins gui. Pressing [Jump] in Skate mode, you can launch where you looking at with skates when on ground or wall. Consume Hunger. Works under water too.

<details>
<summary>Skates Plugins list</summary>
🟩 Echo Shard Skate Plugin

- You able to jump in air using stacks, restore when near to the ground or wall. Stacks amount base on Echo Shard plugins amount. Won't consume any Hunger.

🔲 Nether Star Skate Plugin

- Every launch will give you extre power, strength and healing. Amount of launch power will increase base on Neether Star plugins amount.

🟪 Dragon Head Skate Plugin

- Every launch from near to the ground or wall will able to Push and deal damage to entity around. Damage amount base on Dragon Head plugins amount. Consume More Hunger.

🟧 Blaze Rod Skate Plugin

- You will create a fire wall behind you when skating forward on land. You immune to fire wall. Duration of fire wall will increase base on Blaze Rod plugins amount.

🟦 Prismarine Shard Skate Plugin

- You no longer consume hunger when launching in water. You receive Dolphin grace when having full Prismarine Shard Plugin.

⚪ Blue Ice Plugins

- Your attacks will apply Freeze and extra slowness. Slowness level increase base on Blue Ice plugins amount.

🟠Magma Cube Skate Plugins

 - You will ignite mobs around when land. Ignite area will increase base on Magma Cream plugins amount.
</details>

🔴 Sword Plugins `20231226`
- When in Sword mode, it will it will automatic apply Anti-Gravity technology. Your every attack will be apply Anti-Gravity technology, and keep Consume Hunger.

<details>
<summary>Sword Plugins list</summary>
🟩 Echo Shard Sword Plugin

- Your attacks will launch target far away. Distant base on Echo Shard plugins amount.

🔲 Nether Star Sword Plugin

- Your attack will heals you and receive strength. Heal amount base on Nether Star amount.

🟪 Dragon Head Sword Plugin

- You will teleport to the target behind that attack you, and receive Haste effect base on Dragon Head plugins amount.

🟧 Blaze Rod Sword Plugin

- Your attacks will apply ignite. Duration of fire increase base on Blaze Rod plugins amount.

🟦 Prismarine Shard Sword  Plugin

- You deal 10% more damage to target that in water. Damage scale up to 90% base on Prismarine shard plugins amount.

⚪ Blue Ice Plugins

- Your attacks will apply Freeze and extra slowness. Slowness level increase base on Blue Ice plugins amount.

🟠Magma Cube Sword Plugins
 
 - Your deal more damage to target that ignited. Increase 10% per Magma plugins.
</details>


🎵 Music Plugins `20231203`
- No matter in which mode you in, Music Plugins always work. [Crouch + Use] to set target to [GravityDancers], [Crouch + Hit] to remove them from [GravityDancers].
- `Every Disc will have different Music play when in Plugins slot. Can be adjust volume in Jukebox/Note Blocks Sound Options.`

<details>
<summary>Music Plugins List</summary>

 - ♭13 > You will knockback entity around that is not [GravityDancers]

 - ♭cat > You will slow entity around that is not [GravityDancers]

 - ♯blocks > You will give absorption to entity around that is [GravityDancers]

 - ♯chirp > You will give health boost to entity around that is [GravityDancers]

 - ♯far > You will slowly heal entity around that is [GravityDancers]

 - ♯mall > You will give luck to entity around that is [GravityDancers]

 - ♭mellohi > You will give unluck to entity around that is not [GravityDancers]

 - ♯stal > You will give night vision to entity around that is not [GravityDancers]

 - ♯strad > You will give speed to entity around that is [GravityDancers]

 - ♯ward > You will give jump boost to entity around that is [GravityDancers]

 - ♭11 > You will give darkness to entity around that is not [GravityDancers]

 - ♭wait > You will give blindness to entity around that is not [GravityDancers]

 - ♯relic > You will give saturation to entity around that is [GravityDancers]

 - ♯5 > You will give resistance to entity around that is [GravityDancers]

 - ♭pigstep > You will give weakness to entity around that is not [GravityDancers]

 - ♭otherside > You will deal 2 damage point to entity around that is not [GravityDancers]
</details>

🔵 Skaters  `20231116`
- Your armor only have half of the defence. You receive weakness when not in Sword mode.

🔵 Data Log `20231221`
- You can check your progress in Advancement tab.


Any questions can ask me from my discord ::: )
Discord : Ten_Mic_10#8198
